meaning: n.<英方>[建]一面坡屋(亦作 outshut)
examples: In overtime, they had six shots on an early power play and outshot the Rangers 16-5.
After being badly outshot early, the Penguins closed the gap to 13-8 in the period.
Held to four shots in the first period, the Sabres were outshot 18-8 through 32 minutes.
